Who We Are

Aspiring Designers
Building Legacies

VAICITRYA is a full-service architectural and design firm based in Sivasagar, Assam. We bring visionary design thinking to every project — from property valuation to final construction — crafting spaces that become lasting landmarks across Northeast India.

Our team combines deep technical expertise with creative ambition to deliver spaces that are not just built, but crafted with purpose, precision, and enduring beauty.

Architecture Interior Structural Landscape Infrastructure

Founder & Principal Architect
A Word From Our Founder
"

Every structure we design carries a promise — to turn your vision into a space that speaks, breathes, and endures. At VAICITRYA, we don't just build buildings; we craft experiences that reflect who you are and where you aspire to be.

From the first sketch to the final finish, our team walks with you — with honesty, creativity, and a deep respect for your dream. Northeast India deserves world-class design, and that is exactly what we bring to every project.

VAICITRYA Design Group
Est. 2016 · Sivasagar, Assam
